sections.paragraph:
Original: עדר

Transliteration: ‛âdar

Phonetic: aw-dar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to help
    1. (Qal) to help
  2. to hoe
    1. (Niphal) to be hoed
  3. to be lacking, fail
    1. (Niphal)
      1. to be lacking
      2. to leave lacking
    2. (Piel) to leave lacking

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1570,1571,1572

Part(s) of speech: Verb
